title: rubus arvernensis
intro: Rubus arvernensis, also known as the French black raspberry, is a species of bramble in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to Europe. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, including its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and sore throats. The health benefits of Rubus arvernensis include its ability to protect against oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, and is also used as a natural dye, highlighting its versatility in herbal preparations.
